Khonza Mitty of Kerra  

a rare creature
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded May 20th, 2017 by Bobbybick

  • Placeholder is: a kerran amira priestess
  • This mob spawns at 104, 2270.

Mitty can still be found in Kerra Isle. She no longer holds the rings which she bought from the Moltors used in the Paw of Opalla quest, which instead are "sold" by another Kerran.

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2017-05-20 06:45:43.

Level: 23
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2021-04-17 11:45:49
Known Loot:
Collector's Kerran Doll
Exquisite Platinum Etched Rune
Jade
Makeshift Binding Powder

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Decreased:
  Kerra Isle -5
Quests:
  Hunter of Toxxulia Forest

Report a correction

Post Comment
khonza
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2006 at 5:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592772917456
153 posts
Umm, I'm gonna point out to you guys that Khonza Mitty of Kerra DOES SPAWN!!! I saw her, at the priestess palace, which is near the "Lord Gongo" spawn area. I tried to kill her...at level 35...by charming a gorilla shaman and pulling her with him. No adds, but I eventually decided to run to the place with Shazda, charmed one of his lions and everything went haywire from there. Adds like crazy, everywhere, charm kept breaking, and Khonza Mitty STILL hadn't died!!!

Wound up having to zone, but Khonza WAS up I saw her with my own eyes!!!
▲ Page top
Not level 20

This mob cons red to my level 20 human cleric

this is a total lie i have been playing eq for 3 years there is no such named what so ever of this i hat when ppl lie about this crap

# Dec 03 2001 at 10:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251444633

Hey..ummmm ive been in cb for about 30 lvl together on 2 alts and ive never seen this socho of cb where might i find him.

Dogna Cryofern

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 18 2000 at 9:16 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) why dont you guys argue this somewhere else and leave this thread for info on Mitty.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 18 2000 at 4:56 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have camped Gynok a great deal, and every time save one that I have seen him killed, he has has a plat ring. That's 1 in 5 that he does not. And you're telling me it's rare? Come on.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 17 2000 at 6:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well, I wanted to share my knowledge with you all, correct a few things that have been not clear, and ask a few questions.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 17 2000 at 1:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Since Gynok was brought up I will clear up one mistake that was stated. I camped him once and got the kill, he looted a stupid silver ring for the paw quest, not the usual platinum. So he doesn't ALWAYS drop the ring expected, but he does most of the time.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 12 2000 at 12:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your all wrong!!! there is one creature more camped then all of those put together! and thats Gynok Moltor, he is a SUPER rare spawn, even though the ring drops everytime
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 05 2000 at 2:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Damnit, I'm doingthe Paw, and there is not a time the damn cat is not camped, i have to group with the guy there til he leaves... 15 hours and nothing yet, guy before me got it first kill...
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 23 2000 at 12:04 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Me tink dat da Ancient Cyclopz iz da most camped out of his apearannces in Sro and OOT they are both alwayz camped more dne mitty yet then Bilge iz camped for 13-24 hourz if not sometimes a few dayz for his great kedge totem(18wis -9 str) but mitty is not the most camped... i could keep on goign but i most leave now so ahve fun ebery one but Mitty is not most camped. Guud nyte and Guud luck.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 22 2000 at 11:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually 'the fbss guy' as you put it is like most other things, camped for the most part during the day. Same goes for the treants, the trainer, and mitty. The most camped NPC in the game in my humble opinion is the ancient croc in guk. Every time i go in to lower guk i check, every time i leave lower guk i check. Between groups.. i check.. that damn croc is ALWAYS camped.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 22 2000 at 10:57 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Even though it is a rare spawn I think the fbss guy has got to be most camped
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 19 2000 at 3:38 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) treant are camp the most on week day s at 5am therea list of 15 people on it
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 16 2000 at 5:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hehe, I have never seen the trainer NOT camped by at least 2 groups.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 06 2000 at 7:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Da trainer is da most campeded camp in da world of da norrath. It's cuz he's da low level and he da first fing fer da low level peoples ta camp. It's gud moneys fer da shield fer dat level too, 20pp is alots to da low level elfies dat camps it.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 04 2000 at 6:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I can't just sit here and watch this idiot, trainer the most camped camp? Yeah whatever, he drops a dumb 10 ac shield, think about it loser. My god, how stupid can you get? I didn't think it was possible to be as retarded as you
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 01 2000 at 11:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The world's most camped creature more than likely.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 01 2000 at 11:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No my friend, Dyllan Starshine is the most camped creature in the game . . except maybe that barb who drops the fishbone earrings.
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 22 2000 at 6:59 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) the most camped creature has to be the orc trainer in CB; that is where camping was born
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 17 2000 at 2:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) no mitty is far more camped the page for the testament is dropped everytime, you just have to wait 8 hours and hope someone doesn't steal him from you, just did it for the third time and the camp was only 4 hours, anyway, mitty is more camped because her dropping the gold ring is like winning the lottery, for real, its been looted in the first kill and its taken one of my guilds on Xegony 62 horus of camping to get one..
